basic_details.job_title: IIM Indore Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Indore (Indian Institute of Management Indore) (IIM Indore) Assistant Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Has been announced through the IIM Indore Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Electronics/Electrical Engineering/IT) are eligible to apply for these Assistant Engineer vacancies. The email application process for IIM Indore Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 15 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and ap

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in engineering (Electronics/ Electrical Engineering /IT).
qualification.details: Assistant Engineer (Electronics & Communication): Bachelor's degree in engineering (Electronics/ Electrical Engineering /IT) with 3 to 5 years of relevant experience in AV integration, site management, or troubleshooting in corporate, educational, or event environments etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated monthly pay package (not a constraint for deserving candidates)
salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly pay package (not a constraint for deserving candidates)

selection_process: Mere fulfilling of the minimum qualification and experience requirements will not confer any right on the candidates for being called for Interview or/and their selection. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Indore Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Engineer post at IIM Indore?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Assistant Engineer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in engineering, specifically in Electronics, Electrical Engineering, or IT. Relevant experience is also a key requirement.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for any category of candidates applying for this post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Assistant Engineer position at IIM Indore is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum experience required for the Assistant Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have 3 to 5 years of relevant experience in areas such as AV integration, site management, or troubleshooting.

faq.question: Q7. Will candidates be notified if they are not shortlisted?
faq.answer: No, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted by IIM Indore for further selection stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Engineer post?
faq.answer: A consolidated monthly pay package will be offered. The salary is not a constraint for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 453556.
